body: ClimaComms no longer automatically runs on the GPU if it finds one. See this [guide](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaComms.jl/wiki/Transition-to-ClimaComms.jl-0.6) for details.
title: Fix buildkite for new ClimaComms

title: Update climacommon to 2024_04_30
